name: openclaw
description: Aura Desktop hard-fork of the OpenClaw runtime: WebSocket protocol extensions (ping, session.info, gateway.stats), rich /health, structured observability + JSONL tool audit, optional HTTP/file allowlists, UI-gated sensitive tools via Aura host bridge, in-app BrowserView automation (browser_* tools), and first-class SKILL.md workspace skills (list_skills, read_skill). Agent loop uses Groq function calling with 25+ tools.
author: Persist Ventures
